title: Typography Basics
description: Style text with font-family, font-weight, line-height, and text-align properties
html:
My First Post

This is the body text of my very first blog post. It should be easy to read with proper line spacing and alignment.
starterCss:
/* Style the title: center-aligned, bold, sans-serif font
   Style the body: 1.6 line-height, serif font */

validationRules.message: The body text should have 1.6 line-height

hints.text: Font properties control how text appears. Think about alignment, weight, and spacing.
Use 'text-align: center' and 'font-weight: bold' on the title. Use 'line-height: 1.6' on the body.
